13.reason: [In C89, variable declaration inside for loop is not allowed; this causes a compilation error. Use int j; declared earlier.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [In C89, variable declaration inside for loop is not allowed; this causes a compilation error. Use int j; declared earlier.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [C89 may not allow declaration inside for; use separate int j;]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [C89/C90 standard does not allow variable declaration inside for-loop initialization, which causes a compilation error in strict environments]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  In C89/C90 standard, declaring loop variables inside the for-loop initialization is not allowed; 'int j' should be declared at the beginning of the block.
